AmpliVerse

The Unfinished Scroll

When the oracle falls silent, one shinobi charts a new path through the web

Cast

The Coordinator

Research Commander

A lone operative who commands every mission from the front, wielding research techniques and web jutsu with the precision of a veteran shinobi. When the primary technique fails, they don't hesitate — they improvise. Their nindo: no quest goes unanswered.

The Questgiver

Mission Giver

The one who sets quests in motion and decides when they end. Speaks rarely, but each word carries the weight of purpose. Their cancellation at ninety percent completion was the cruelest twist — though they may not have known how close the finish line was.

The Scout

Web Search Specialist

The fastest tracker in the web module guild — when deployed in parallel, they cover more ground than any oracle. Six missions, six successes. Their perfect record is no accident; it's discipline.

The Retriever

Field Intelligence Agent

Where the scouts find the trail, the Retriever follows it to the source and carries heavy intelligence back in a reinforced scroll satchel. Four of five targets secured is a record they are determined to improve.

It began with a single request — a deep research quest into uncharted territory.
CRACK!
SHATTER!
Two attempts. Two failures. The oracle would not answer today.
SWOOSH!
Three parallel searches fired into the web at once — a blitz of methodology, theory, and application.
Four authoritative sources recovered. One blocked behind an impassable paywall.
With four sources gathered, the final synthesis began — knowledge weaving into a single coherent scroll.
CANCEL!
At ninety percent complete, the session was terminated. Eighty-five seconds — that was all the time this quest was given.
Thirteen tool calls. Seven parallel batches. Four sources recovered. The research lives on — waiting for its conclusion.
